name: tinyfish-web-agent
description: Use the TinyFish web agent to extract or scrape websites, pull structured data, and automate browser actions with natural language, including bot-protected and geo-restricted sites.

interface.shortDescription: Use the TinyFish web agent to extract or scrape websites, pull structured data, and automate browser actions with natural language, including bot-protected and geo-restricted sites.
interface.longDescription: Verify TINYFISH_API_KEY, then POST a URL and an explicit JSON-shaped goal to the run-sse endpoint, adding stealth or proxy config for protected or geo-restricted sites.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use TinyFish Web Agent safely.
